message:
test(search-core): add 15 tests for query model and 10 for engine traits

Expand query.rs from 9 to 24 tests covering:
- SearchMode: serde all variants, snake_case format, Hash trait
  with 4 distinct variants in HashSet
- ImportanceFilter: serde all 5 variants
- DateRange: start-only, end-only, both-None edge cases
- SearchFilter: all fields populated serde, doc_kind Agent/Project
- SearchQuery: individual builder methods (with_mode, with_limit,
  with_offset, with_explain), minimal JSON deserialization defaults

Expand engine.rs from 7 to 17 tests covering:
- IndexHealth: serde roundtrip, not-ready variant
- IndexStats: serde roundtrip with warnings, empty warnings
- Trait object safety: Box<dyn SearchEngine>, Box<dyn IndexLifecycle>,
  Box<dyn DocumentSource>
- StubLifecycle: incremental with Upsert+Delete changes
- StubSource: fetch_batch with IDs, fetch_all_batched with offset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
